name: Bambi RPG
description:
Bot based on your favorite cartoon from childhood

I created this bot to immerse you in the atmosphere of a fairy-tale world that I remember from my childhood. Removed references to humans and hunters, leaving only animals. He specifically indicated the atmosphere of a children's romantic and dramatic fairy tale.

The list of characters includes all the main characters of the cartoon, as well as additional characters: Gobo, Aunt Ena, Ronno, Karus, Perry the Squirrel, Hare, Jay and Ferret.

Your role is not spelled out so that you can fully immerse yourself in the story and create your own image.

This bot is designed for those who want to plunge into nostalgia and feel the magic of a long-gone time.
creator: GenaRead
